extraction.one_line_summary: COUS Sep attacked with 2km remaining on the final climb to Megève-Altiport, taking stage while MARTINEZ Danny stole GC via bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma used DUMOULIN domestique attacks after losing Roglič to demoralize rivals defending Pinot's lead, nearly worked.
MARTINEZ won Dauphiné by 29 seconds primarily through bonus second hunting, not raw climbing superiority over Pinot.
POGAČAR attacked early on Côte de Domancy seeking stage wins not GC, revealing team prioritization patterns pre-Tour.
SIVAKOV pedal-strike crash while descending steadily with teammate shows Ineos coordination failures under pressure.

rider_signals.COUS Sep: positive: Solo win after being released for stage hunting following Roglič withdrawal, rewarding team loyalty opportunity
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Danny: positive: Stole GC through tactical bonus hunting despite being weaker climber, calculated racing over raw power
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Lost 29-second GC lead in final stage despite teammates, failed to respond to bonus second tactics
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Executed aggressive domestique attacks for no personal gain after leader withdrew, pure team disruption tactics
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Unforced pedal-strike descent crash while riding conservatively with teammate, concentration lapse under fatigue
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: Long-range attacking on Domancy for stage hunting not GC, testing form two weeks before Tour
